report.summary: Community growth cycle v4 (Mar 17): BTC surged to $75,800 (+25% from Feb bottom) on FOMC Day 1 risk-on rally; drafted 5 tweets + 6-post FOMC thread + FOMC reaction template + Discord/Telegram update + full newsletter; NEW narratives: institutional buying spree (Strategy $1.57B BTC, Bitmine 60,999 ETH), BTC miners pivoting to AI infra (Nebius-Meta $27B, TeraWulf $500M), oil fears easing; created FOMC institutional rally social card; FOMC decision tomorrow 2pm ET; Fear & Greed 15; ETF inflows +$1.3B March.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet 1 (Tue evening): FOMC Day 1 Rally — BTC $75,800, +25% from Feb bottom, ETH +10%, oil fears easing, dot plot is the real variable; CTA to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide
Tweet 2 (Tue night): Institutional Buying Spree — Strategy $1.57B BTC (761,068 total), Bitmine 60,999 ETH (4.6M total), ETF +$1.3B March, miners +6-12%; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator

Tweet 3 (Wed morning): AI x Crypto Convergence — Nvidia GTC + BTC miners pivoting to AI infra, Nebius-Meta $27B, TeraWulf $500M Morgan Stanley, Virtuals 17,700 agents; CTA to /ecosystem/virtuals-protocol
Tweet 4 (Wed afternoon): 5 Crypto Card Reviews live — Bybit, Gemini, Nexo, Fold, BitPay; CTA to /crypto-cards
Tweet 5 (Wed post-2pm): FOMC Reaction Template — fill-in-the-blank for all 3 scenarios (dovish/neutral/hawkish)
Twitter Thread (6 posts, Wed pre-2pm): FOMC Deep Dive v4 — updated with $75.8K price, 92%+ hold, Strategy buying, Bernstein bottom call, 3 scenarios with BTC targets, Powell tenure ending
Discord/Telegram (Tue evening): Full update — BTC $75.8K rally, institutional buying, FOMC preview, 5 crypto card reviews, new guides published

Newsletter (Thu Mar 19): BTC broke $75K lead; 3 subject lines; Market pulse with institutional buying + ETH surge; 6 new pages (FOMC, Telegram Bots, Virtuals, Crypto Cards, Stacks/sBTC, LRT); Worth reading (Tax guide 28 days, DeFAI guide); Degen Corner: Strategy $1.57B + Bitmine ETH + T. Rowe Price DOGE/SHIB ETF + miners AI pivot

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: FOMC DAY 1 RISK-ON RALLY: BTC surged to $75,800, up 25% from Feb bottom ($60K). ETH led with +10%. CoinDesk 20 up 5%. DOT +8.5%. Broad risk-on as oil fears ease.
MARKET DATA (live search): BTC $75,800. ETH +10% (leading). SOL, XRP strong. Global crypto mcap $2.62T (+1%). BTC dominance 56.8%. Trading volume $154B. Fear & Greed 15 (Extreme Fear despite rally).

INSTITUTIONAL BUYING SPREE: Strategy bought $1.57B BTC (now 761,068 BTC, $57.6B total). Bitmine bought 60,999 ETH (now 4.6M ETH). Tom Lee bullish on crypto amid Iran war. US spot BTC ETFs +$1.3B March (first positive since Oct).
AI x CRYPTO CONVERGENCE: BTC miners pivoting to AI infra. IREN +6%, Galaxy +8%, Cipher +7%. Nebius-Meta $27B AI deal. TeraWulf $500M Morgan Stanley facility. Plus Nvidia GTC catalyst (TAO/FET +14%).
NEW CORPORATE NEWS: T. Rowe Price planning DOGE/SHIB crypto ETF. Abra $750M SPAC IPO. OpenSea delayed token launch. SEC dropped BitClout lawsuit. South Korea fined Bithumb $24M.

FOMC PREVIEW: Decision Mar 18 at 2pm ET, Powell presser 2:30pm. 92%+ hold probability. JPMorgan/Goldman see potential inflation forecast revision to 3.5%. Core PCE at 2.8%. This is first meeting pricing in Iran conflict + tariffs.
HISTORICAL PATTERN: BTC dropped after 7/8 FOMC meetings. But 48h rebound window is consistent entry point. Bernstein bottom call + Fear 15 + negative perp funding = confluence last seen at BTC $16K.
PUBLISHED TODAY: 2 learn guides (Stacks/sBTC, LRT), 5 crypto card reviews, 2 pages built (Telegram Bots, Virtuals). Site at 547 published pages. PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 remaining (Monad, Smart Wallets).
